name: Errol Dam (Androscoggin River fly-fishing-only reach)
notes: Fly-only from Errol dam to the Bragg Bay deadwater markers.

name: Trophy Stretch pull-offs, Rt 3 (Connecticut River, Pittsburg)
notes: Roadside parking between Second and First Connecticut Lakes.

name: Magalloway Rd bridge (Connecticut River, Pittsburg)
notes: Lower boundary of the fly-fishing-only Trophy Stretch.

name: Sewalls Falls (Merrimack River, Concord)
notes: Year-round stocked-trout reach of the Merrimack.

name: Saco River off River Rd (North Conway, First Bridge)
notes: Popular stocked reach near North Conway (approx. location).
